# Tags

Operations related to tags. Tags are used to organize and categorize content using a flexible tagging system.

## Operations At A Glance

| Method | Path | Summary | Auth |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| `POST` | `/customer-teams/{customer_team_id}/tags` | Create customer team tag. | Bearer token required |
| `PUT` | `/customer-teams/{customer_team_id}/tags` | Update customer team tag. | Bearer token required |
| `DELETE` | `/customer-teams/{customer_team_id}/tags/{tag_id}` | Delete customer team tag. | Bearer token required |
| `POST` | `/orders/{order_id}/tags` | Create tag for order. | Bearer token required |
| `PUT` | `/orders/{order_id}/tags` | Update tag for order. | Bearer token required |
| `DELETE` | `/orders/{order_id}/tags/{tag_id}` | Delete tag for order. | Bearer token required |
| `POST` | `/products/{product_id}/tags` | Create tag. | Bearer token required |
| `PUT` | `/products/{product_id}/tags` | Update product tag. | Bearer token required |
| `DELETE` | `/products/{product_id}/tags/{tag_id}` | Delete product tag. | Bearer token required |
| `PUT` | `/products/{product_id}/tags/{tag_id}` | Update tag. | Bearer token required |
| `POST` | `/tags` | Create tag. | Bearer token required |
| `PUT` | `/tags/{tag_id}` | Update tag. | Bearer token required |
